name: gsa_perdiem
description: GSA Per Diem Rates MCP server (1102tools/federal-contracting-mcps). 6 read-only tools over the GSA Per Diem API: city/ZIP/state lookup, M&IE breakdown, travel cost estimation, multi-location comparison. Works without configuration via shared DEMO_KEY (rate-limited); set PERDIEM_API_KEY to a free api.data.gov key for 1,000 req/hr.
